issues.current_text: После if всегда ставь двоеточие. Это как знак: дальше команды для этого условия.
issues.reason: Dialogue uses 'услови' which relates to 'if', a forbidden concept before this lesson
issues.suggested_fix: Rephrase to avoid referencing this concept

operator_review.reason: Harmless forward reference to if keyword. Lesson 1-7 (comparisons) is immediately before lesson 2-1 (if). Post-error dialogue mentions syntax briefly without teaching conditional logic. Word "услови" is ordinary Russian ("conditions"), not programming instruction.

issues.current_text: А если я хочу отсортировать не по самому значению, а по длине строки или по возрасту из словаря?
issues.reason: Dialogue uses 'словар' which relates to 'dict', a forbidden concept before this lesson
issues.suggested_fix: Rephrase to avoid referencing this concept

operator_review.reason: Word "словарь" (dictionary) refers to Python dict already introduced in Part 3. By lesson 4-17, dict is a known concept. Also an ordinary Russian word. No premature concept issue.

issues.reason: Correct solution appears joined into one line without proper formatting

operator_review.reason: Single-line correct answer print("Привет") is inherently one line for lesson 1-1 (print function). Simple missions with single-line correct answers are valid.

issues.reason: Correct solution appears joined into one line without proper formatting

operator_review.reason: Single-line correct answer print("\n".join(["a","b"])) is standard Python using str.join(). The find_bug task only requires fixing slash direction. Single line is correct here.

issues.current_text: Игрок вводит число своих монет — 8. Добавь 1 монету и выведи результат (9).
issues.reason: Wording 'выведи результат' is ambiguous if expected output is not clearly specified
issues.suggested_fix: Clearly specify what should be displayed

operator_review.reason: Expected result shown in parentheses (9). Task clearly states: input 8, add 1, print result.

issues.current_text: Атака = 7, защита = 6 у Багуса. Посчитай суммарный урон (7 + 6) и выведи результат.

operator_review.reason: Calculation (7 + 6) explicitly shown. Expected output 13 trivial to compute. Arithmetic lesson context makes expected print value clear.

issues.current_text: Дано число score. Если score >= 90 — выведи A. Если score >= 70 — выведи B. Иначе — выведи C. Напиши программу для score = 80.
issues.reason: Wording 'напиши программу' may overstate when only one line is expected
issues.suggested_fix: Consider 'напиши код' or 'выведи' instead if single line

operator_review.reason: "Напиши программу" appropriate for lesson 2-2 (if/elif/else chain). Expected solution is multi-line with conditional structure, not a single expression.

issues.current_text: Создай функцию add(a, b), которая возвращает сумму двух чисел. Выведи результат вызова add(7, 8).
